testcase.name: postconnectionmetergrpv4
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Connection":{"Success":true,"Data":{"MeterGroupId":"MTGR00000000001"},"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Created","Level":1}]}}] but found testcase.name: putMeterReadingNetMeterV4

failure.message: expected [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"It is not allowed to enter a reading for net meter period 1.","Level":3}]}}] but found [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location has bill in work. No adjustment can be made until bill is posted or deleted.","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"It is not allowed to enter a reading for net meter period 1.","Level":3}]}}] but found [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location has bill in work. testcase.name: putMeterReadingnottheLatestreadingV4

failure.message: expected [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"READ00000000905 is not the latest reading for the connection/equipment. Most recent meter reading READ00000000907 must be delete.","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"It is not allowed to enter a reading for net meter period 1.","Level":3}]}}] but found [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location has bill in work. No adjustment can be made until bill is posted or deleted.","Level":3}]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"READ00000000905 is not the latest reading for the connection/equipment. Most recent meter reading READ00000000907 must be delete.","Level":3},{"Enabled":1,"Info":"It is not allowed to enter a reading for net meter period 1.","Level":3}]}}] but found [{"MeterReading":{"Success":false,"Data":null,"Messages":[{"Enabled":1,"Info":"Location has bill in work. testcase.name: getActionsMenu_v4

failure.message: expected [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"ActionCode":"2","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":1,"Description":"Request to read meter","FirstContactDateTime":"2022-01-01T12:15:14","NextContactDateTime":"2022-01-21T11:11:12","CompletedDateTime":"2022-04-09T16:01:05","IsCompleted":true,"ResolutionText":"","ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000009013","StatusDescription":"Pending","RequestId":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection"},"FollowUpEmployee":{"Id":"ZAID0001","FirstName":"Syed","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Zaidi"},"User":{"Id":"sa","FirstName":"Sam","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Arsenault"}}]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"ContactLog":{"Success":true,"Data":{"Detail":[{"ActionCode":"2","AdditionalText":"","ContactMethod":1,"Description":"Request to read meter","FirstContactDateTime":"2022-01-01T12:15:14","NextContactDateTime":"2022-01-21T11:11:12","CompletedDateTime":"2022-04-09T16:01:05","IsCompleted":true,"ResolutionText":"","ServiceOrder":{"Number":"SORD00000009021","StatusDescription":"Pending","RequestId":"DISCONNECT","RequestDescription":"Disconnected connection"},"FollowUpEmployee":{"Id":"ZAID0001","FirstName":"Syed","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Zaidi"},"User":{"Id":"sa","FirstName":"Sam","MiddleName":"M.","LastName":"Arsenault"}}]},"Messages":[]}}]
